name: Galiano Gold Inc.
description: Galiano Gold Inc. is a Canadian-based precious metals exploration and development company. The company's flagship asset is the Asanko Gold Mine, located in Ghana, West Africa, which it operates and owns a 90% interest in (with the Government of Ghana holding the remaining 10%). Galiano Gold is focused on creating value for its shareholders through sustainable and safe mining practices, exploration success, and disciplined capital allocation.
